intentAndPurpose.intent: Text input field: `Field.Root` + **Input** (`Field.Label` / `Field.Description` for label-stack copy, `Field.Control` for the `<input>`, 4-slot shell), then `InputFeedback` (including native `Field.Error` when there is no string `error` / custom `feedback`), and DynamicText. Default info uses `IconButton` + `Tooltip` (override with `infoIconSlot`). Optional `labelSlot` replaces string `label` / `description`.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent appearance role. 'auto' resolves to 'primary'.

props.name: attention
props.description: Visual attention — 'medium' (outlined, default) or 'high' (filled neutral background).

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Autocomplete attribute

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Autofocus attribute

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class name

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Default value (uncontrolled)

props.name: description
props.description: Description text below the label row (ignored when `labelSlot` is set)

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the input is disabled

props.name: dynamicText
props.description: Leading copy (trimmed non-empty string only). Ignored when `dynamicTextSlot` is set.

props.name: dynamicTextSlot
props.description: Dynamic text row slot — pass `<InputDynamicText … />`. When set, `dynamicText` and `helperButton` are ignored.

props.name: end
props.description: Trailing content slot — IconButton, Icon, Button, or Text

props.name: end2
props.description: Second trailing content slot — Text, Icon, or IconButton

props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display (shorthand for InputFeedback variant="negative")

props.name: feedback
props.description: Feedback slot — pass `<InputFeedback … />` or leave unset and use `error` string.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretch to fill container width

props.name: helperButton
props.description: Trailing action label (trimmed non-empty string only); renders as `Button` attention low + condensed. Ignored when `dynamicTextSlot` is set.

props.name: id
props.description: HTML id attribute for the input element

props.name: infoIcon
props.description: When true with a string `label`, shows the default info control unless `infoIconSlot` is set.

props.name: infoIconAriaLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the default info `IconButton`. Ignored when `infoIconSlot` is set.

props.name: infoIconSlot
props.description: Replaces the default tooltip + info `IconButton` when `infoIcon` is true.

props.name: infoTooltipContent
props.description: Tooltip content for the default info control. Ignored when `infoIconSlot` is set.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the field invalid for `Field.Root` and error chrome on the bordered control.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text for the field (ignored when `labelSlot` is set)

props.name: labelSlot
props.description: Label slot — custom node (same `Field.Root`) replacing string `label` / `description` / default info props when set. When set, `label`, `description`, `infoIcon`, and default info props are ignored.

props.name: leftAddon
props.description: leftAddon property

props.name: name
props.description: Field name for form submission

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Blur event handler

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler — receives the new value string

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Focus event handler

props.name: onKeyDown
props.description: Keydown event handler

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the input is read-only

props.name: required
props.description: Whether the control is required (native `required` on the `<input>`).

props.name: rightAddon
props.description: rightAddon property

props.name: shape
props.description: Shape of the input field

props.name: size
props.description: Input size — f-step number or t-shirt alias. Default: 10 (M).

props.name: start
props.description: Leading content slot — Icon, IconButton, Avatar, Image, ChipGroup, or Text

props.name: start2
props.description: Second leading content slot — Text (prefix, currency symbol)

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles

props.name: type
props.description: Input type (text, email, password, number, tel, url, search)

props.name: validate
props.description: Custom validation function

props.name: validationMode
props.description: Validation mode

props.name: value
props.description: Current value (controlled)

attention.description: Visual attention — 'medium' (outlined, default) or 'high' (filled neutral background).

dynamicText.description: Dynamic text below the input (character count, hints)

end.description: Trailing content slot — IconButton, Icon, Button, or Text

end2.description: Second trailing content slot — Text, Icon, or IconButton

error.description: Error message to display (shorthand for InputFeedback variant="negative")

feedback.description: Feedback content — overrides error for rich feedback

helperButton.description: Helper button/link content below the input

id.description: HTML id attribute for the input element

infoIcon.description: Whether to show info icon next to label

invalid.description: Whether the field is invalid (triggers error border)

onChange.description: Change handler — receives the new value string

size.description: Input size — f-step number or t-shirt alias. Default: 10 (M).

start.description: Leading content slot — Icon, IconButton, Avatar, Image, ChipGroup, or Text

start2.description: Second leading content slot — Text (prefix, currency symbol)

type.description: Input type (text, email, password, number, tel, url, search)
